chapters.title: Das Herz des Waldes
chapters.setting: The Heiliger Hain — the sacred grove. Ancient trees form a cathedral of bark and shadow.
chapters.plot_beat: Final confrontation with the Schattengeist. Mixed challenge set drawing on all prior learning.

chapters.title: Die Wahl
chapters.setting: The heart of the grove. The shadow dissolves to reveal the wounded Waldwächter.
chapters.plot_beat: Player chooses: Rache (destroy the spirit) or Vergebung (release and heal it). Both end Episode I.
chapters.language_focus: Free response — player writes their choice and reasoning in German

choices.label: Rache — Zerstöre den Geist
choices.consequence: The curse ends. The forest loses its guardian. Episode II opens in a darker world.

choices.label: Vergebung — Befreie den Geist
choices.consequence: The Waldwächter is reborn. The forest heals. Episode II opens with Brunhilde as an active ally.

epilogue.title: Die Auflösung
epilogue.summary_prompt: Generate a personalised epilogue for {player_name} referencing their ending choice ({ending}) and final stats.
epilogue.episode_2_teaser: Die Gilde ruft dich. Eine neue Zeitlinie beginnt.
